description: Letter. In Arabic script. The sender says that he initially planned to go to Alexandria "as soon as I heard the news" but then saw fit to delay his travel until he asked permission from the addressee (evidently the purpose of the present letter).
description_he: מכתב. בכתב ערבי. השולח אומר שתכנן ללכת לאלכסנדריה אך נמנע עד שיבקש רשות מהנמען. כנראה מטרת המכתב הנוכחי.
